rollbase.help:
гҖҗрҹҺІ Basic DiceгҖ‘
в•ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹҺҜ Format в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ вҖў [dice]d[sides][operator][value]
в”Ӯ вҖў Optional label after a space
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ”ў Math в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ Operators:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў + - * / ( )
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў > < >= <=
в”Ӯ гҖҖe.g. ((2d6+1)*2)-5/2>=10
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ вңЁ Special в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ Multi-roll:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў [count] [notation]
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў Max {{max_roll_times}}
в”Ӯ гҖҖe.g. 5 3D6
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Keep / drop:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў kh[N] вҖ” keep highest N
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў kl[N] вҖ” keep lowest N
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў dh[N] вҖ” drop highest N
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў dl[N] вҖ” drop lowest N
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ“қ Examples в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ вҖў (2d6+1)*2 attack!
в”Ӯ гҖҖsample: (10[5+5]+1)2 = 22
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў 3d6kh1
в”Ӯ гҖҖkeep highest 1
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў 3d6dl2
в”Ӯ гҖҖdrop lowest 2
в•°в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

help.base:
гҖҗрҹҺІ Dice SystemгҖ‘
в•ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹҺҜ Secret rolls в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ вҖў dr [command] - result via DM
в”Ӯ вҖў ddr/dddr - DM to configured GMs
в”Ӯ вҖў .drgm - GM settings
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ“Ҡ Basic rolls в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ Format: [count]d[sides][operator][modifier]
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Examples:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў 2d6+1 - roll two d6 +1
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў (2d6+1)*2 attack!
в”Ӯ гҖҖ  sample: (10[5+5]+1)2 = 22
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Advanced:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .5 3D6 - roll 3d6 five times
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў math + parentheses
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў comparisons >, <, >=, <=
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Keep/drop:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў kh - keep highest
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў kl - keep lowest
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў dh - drop highest
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў dl - drop lowest
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Examples:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў 3d6kh1 - keep highest die
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў 3d6dl2 - drop lowest two
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹҺІ RPG Dice Roller в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ Command: .rr [notation]
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Features:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў Foundry VTT notation
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў Advanced roll options
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Examples:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў 1d10r1 - reroll 1s
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў 5d10!k2 - explode, keep 2
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ рҹ“ҡ Full docs:
в”Ӯ dice-roller.github.io/documentation
в•°в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

init.help:
гҖҗвҡ”пёҸ Initiative TrackerгҖ‘
In TRPG combat, turn order is usually decided by initiative.
Systems like D&D and Infinite Horror need a fresh 1D20+mod each fight,
so this feature stores your roll formula and supports one-click reroll.

в•ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ“Ӣ Register characters в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ Usage: .in (roll or number) (name)
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ (roll or number) required вҖ” e.g. 1D20+3 or just 5
в”Ӯ (name) optional вҖ” if omitted, uses your chat display name
в”Ӯ Enter different names multiple times to add more characters
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Examples:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .in 1d20+3 Alice
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .in 1d3
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .in 80
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .in -3+6*3/2.1  (supports arithmetic)
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ“Ҡ Show table в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ вҖў .init  вҖ” high to low
в”Ӯ вҖў .initn вҖ” low to high
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹҺІ Reroll initiative в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ вҖў .in reroll
в”Ӯ   Reroll using each character's saved formula
в”Ӯ   (ideal for systems that reroll every combat)
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ вҡҷпёҸ Other в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ вҖў .in remove (name) вҖ” remove that character
в”Ӯ вҖў .in clear вҖ” clear the whole table
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ вӯ• Combat rounds в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ вҖў .init start вҖ” start round
в”Ӯ вҖў .init next вҖ” next turn
в”Ӯ вҖў .init [name] вҖ” jump to character
в”Ӯ вҖў .init end вҖ” end round
в”Ӯ вҖў .init stats [name] [status]
в”Ӯ   (attach status text)
в•°в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

advroll.help:
гҖҗрҹҺІ Advanced Rolling GuideгҖ‘
в•ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ“җ Math (.ca) в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ Command: .ca (no dice)
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ рҹ”ў Basic: .ca 1.2 * (2 + 4.5)
в”Ӯ рҹ“Ҹ Units: 12.7 m to inch
в”Ӯ рҹ“Ҡ Advanced: sin(45 deg) ^ 2
в”Ӯ вҡ–пёҸ Weight: 5 lb to jin
в”Ӯ рҹ“җ Length: 10 m to ft / 10 m = in
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹҺІ Special dice в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ D66 family:
в”Ӯ гҖҖD66   вҖ” normal D66
в”Ӯ гҖҖD66s  вҖ” low digit first
в”Ӯ гҖҖD66n  вҖ” high digit first
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹҺҜ Dice pools в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ Basic:
в”Ӯ гҖҖ5B10   вҖ” roll without summing
в”Ӯ гҖҖ5B10S  вҖ” roll without summing, sorted
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Comparisons:
в”Ӯ гҖҖ5B10<>=x  вҖ” count vs threshold
в”Ӯ гҖҖ5B10 (D)x вҖ” space = вүҘ ; D = вүӨ
в”Ӯ гҖҖe.g. 5B10 5 = 5B10>=5
в”Ӯ гҖҖгҖҖ  5B10 D5 = 5B10<=5
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Exploding / bonus:
в”Ӯ гҖҖ5U10 8   вҖ” explode on 8+
в”Ӯ гҖҖ5U10 8 9 вҖ” count rolls вүҘ9
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹҺҜ Quick range в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ .int 20 50 вҖ” random integer 20вҖ“50
в•°в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

ddr.help:
гҖҗрҹҺІ Dark Roll GMгҖ‘
в•ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ“қ Overview в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ вҖў GM-only private roll delivery
в”Ӯ вҖў Multiple GMs can receive dark rolls
в”Ӯ вҖў Custom GM display names supported
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ‘‘ GM commands в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ в–  Basics:
в”Ӯ вҖў .drgm addgm
в”Ӯ   Register as GM
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў .drgm addgm [alias]
в”Ӯ   Register with a display alias
в”Ӯ   (omit alias to show your real name)
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў .drgm show
в”Ӯ   List current GMs
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў .drgm del [index]
в”Ӯ   Remove a GM by index
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў .drgm del all
в”Ӯ   Clear all GMs
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹҺІ Dark roll modes в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ в–  Three modes:
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў dr [command]
в”Ӯ   Result to yourself only
в”Ӯ   e.g. dr cc 80 Brawl
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў ddr [command]
в”Ӯ   Result to GM and yourself
в”Ӯ   e.g. ddr cc 80 Brawl
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў dddr [command]
в”Ӯ   Result to GM only
в”Ӯ   e.g. dddr cc 80 Brawl
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ’Ў Examples в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ 1пёҸвғЈ Set GM:
в”Ӯ вҖў .drgm addgm
в”Ӯ   Register with your name
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў .drgm addgm HostA
в”Ӯ   Register as "HostA"
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ 2пёҸвғЈ Roll:
в”Ӯ вҖў dr 2d6
в”Ӯ   Roll 2d6; only you see the result
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў ddr cc 50 Stealth
в”Ӯ   Stealth check; you and GM see it
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў dddr .sc 1/1d3
в”Ӯ   Sanity check; GM only
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ вҡ пёҸ Notes в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ вҖў Use .drgm show to confirm GMs first
в”Ӯ вҖў Multiple GMs can receive the same dark roll
в”Ӯ вҖў Aliases help keep GMs anonymous
в”Ӯ вҖў Indexes change after deletes вҖ” check show again
в•°в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

coc.help:
гҖҗрҹҰ‘ Call of Cthulhu RPGгҖ‘
в•ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹҺІ Skill Checks в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ COC6: ccb 80 (skill вүӨ 80)
в”Ӯ COC7: cc 80 (skill вүӨ 80)
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ рҹҺҜ Bonus dice: cc(1~2)
в”Ӯ Example: cc1 80 вҖ” one bonus die
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҡ пёҸ Penalty dice: ccn(1~2)
в”Ӯ Example: ccn2 80 вҖ” two penalty dice
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ рҹ“Ҡ Combined checks:
в”Ӯ гҖҖcc 80,40 Spot Hidden,Brawl
в”Ӯ гҖҖcc1 80,40 Spot Hidden,Brawl (bonus)
в”Ӯ гҖҖccn1 80,40 Spot Hidden,Brawl (penalty)
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ’Җ Sanity Check в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ Format: .sc (SAN) (success)/(failure)
в”Ӯ Examples:
в”Ӯ гҖҖ.sc 50
в”Ӯ гҖҖ.sc 50 1/1d3+1
в”Ӯ гҖҖ.sc 50 1d10/1d100
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹҸғ Chase & Madness в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ .chase вҖ” chase battle generator
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖ» Uses optional rules and a personal reading of the book;
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖ» Read CoC7th Rulebook Ch.7 гҖҢChaseгҖҚ before use
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ ccrt вҖ” Bout of Madness (real-time)
в”Ӯ ccsu вҖ” Bout of Madness (summary)
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ“ҡ Mythos в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ .cccc вҖ” random mythos organization
в”Ӯ .ccdr вҖ” random mythos data
в”Ӯ .ccpc вҖ” casting push-roll consequences
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ‘Ө Character Creation в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ .ccpulpbuild вҖ” PULP character
в”Ӯ .cc6build вҖ” COC6 character
в”Ӯ .cc7build вҖ” COC7 character (ages 7вҖ“89)
в”Ӯ .cc7build random вҖ” COC7 random character
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Custom point-buy rolls:
в”Ӯ .cc7build .xyz вҖ” custom roll method
в”Ӯ Example: .cc7build .752
в”Ӯ гҖҖ7Г—: 3d6Г—5
в”Ӯ гҖҖ5Г—: (2d6+6)Г—5
в”Ӯ гҖҖ2Г—: 3d6Г—5
в”Ӯ You may enter only . вҖ” default is .53
в”Ӯ гҖҖ= 5Г— 3d6Г—5 and 3Г— (2d6+6)Г—5
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ“Ҳ Development в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ Development check:
в”Ӯ .dp (skill%) (name)
в”Ӯ Example: .dp 50 Ride 80 Brawl 70 60
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ .cc7bg вҖ” random character background
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ рҹ“қ .dp development log:
в”Ӯ Records successful CC rolls and critical success/fumble skills
в”Ӯ .dp start вҖ” start logging rolls
в”Ӯ .dp stop вҖ” stop logging rolls
в”Ӯ .dp show вҖ” show your roll log
в”Ӯ .dp showall вҖ” show channel roll log
в”Ӯ .dp auto вҖ” auto-develop and clear log
в”Ӯ .dp clear вҖ” clear your roll log
в”Ӯ .dp clearall вҖ” clear all critical success/fumble records
в•°в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

coc.cult_power_0:
Mythos Creatures
Some form of association with Mythos beings such as Deep Ones, Rat-Things, Shoggoths, Star Vampires, and the like.
In exchange for service or sacrifice, the monster protects and aids the cult leader.
coc.cult_power_1:
Artifacts
Items that grant spell-like abilities, protection, means of attack, or similar effects (such as reservoirs for Magic Points or even POW).
The artifact may originate from beyond Earth or from antiquity.
coc.cult_power_2:
Technology
Perhaps from Xoth (Cthulhu's home before coming to Earth), or from another dimension or another world, such a device may provide spell-like effects, store Magic Points, serve as a magical weapon, or offer protection like armor.
coc.cult_power_3:
Granted Power
A form of "blessing" implanted in the cult leader's mind by Cthulhu or its servitors. This power may replicate the same spell effectsвҖ”or diminished ones, usually at half costвҖ”in Magic Points or POW.
The power may take other forms as well: physical or sensory changesвҖ”tentacles sprouting from the face or body, scaly skin like armor, heightened senses, and so on.
coc.cult_means_0:
Sacrifice
For some purpose, cultists sacrifice living humans and/or animals. This may prove loyalty, serve as a source of power, or form part of a greater plan.
coc.cult_means_1:
Ritual
One or more forms of ritual requiring a small group or a large congregation. The ritual may serve the cult entirely, or satisfy Cthulhu's will to accomplish somethingвҖ”great or small.
coc.cult_means_2:
Gathering
Perhaps collecting knowledge (occult tomes), specific resources, or even specific people. The cult must gather "something" for reasons known only to Cthulhu.
coc.cult_means_3:
Service
By serving a mysterious entityвҖ”one linked to CthulhuвҖ”the cult fulfills Cthulhu's will. In return, the cult receives aid of some kind from that being. Or the cult is already entangled with the entity and must obey its commands. Perhaps the entity has no real tie to Cthulhu and merely claims one to gain more power over the cult.
coc.cult_means_4:
Creation
The cult is commanded to build something. This may be a magical gate, a mysterious artifact, a site that can focus tremendous power, or a temple. Perhaps it is only the creation of a secret network to one day seize a town, a city, a nation, or the world.
coc.cult_means_5:
Destruction
The cult is commanded to destroy somethingвҖ”perhaps whatever obstructs, angers, or harms Cthulhu. This may mean razing an ancient temple, breaking a mystical barrier, or overthrowing a government or organization at odds with Cthulhu's aims.
coc.cult_means_6:
Transformation
Cultists must undergo transformationвҖ”of body or mind. Human limits cannot fulfill Cthulhu's goals, or mortals are too fragile for the world to come, so cultists seek to become something greater. This may be a new stage of human evolution, or assimilation with the Mythos, as with the Deep Ones.
coc.cult_means_7:
Hunt and Kill
Destroy Cthulhu's enemiesвҖ”human factions or rival Mythos races such as the Elder Things whose actions oppose the Great Old One. Such beings may threaten Cthulhu's terrible design. Perhaps in hunting and slaying their quarry, the cult is rewarded: consuming the kill may grant Mythos power or insight, and so on.

character.game_name: гҖҗCharacter CardsгҖ‘ .char (add edit show delete use nonuse button) .ch (set show showall button)
character.help:
гҖҗрҹҺӯ HKTRPG Character CardsгҖ‘
в•ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ“қ Overview в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ вҖў Personal character management
в”Ӯ вҖў One card usable across groups
в”Ӯ вҖў Web and chat clients stay in sync
в”Ӯ вҖў Live rolls and stat tracking
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ”° Quick start в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ 1пёҸвғЈ Create a card
в”Ӯ    .char add
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ 2пёҸвғЈ Create a web account
в”Ӯ    .admin account [user] [password]
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ 3пёҸвғЈ (Optional) Allow web rolls in the group
в”Ӯ    .admin allowrolling
в”Ӯ    .admin registerChannel
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ 4пёҸвғЈ Use the character
в”Ӯ    .char use [name]
в”Ӯ    .ch [commands]
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹҶ• Create / edit в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ в–  Full format:
.char add
name[Sad]~
state[HP:15/15;MP:10/10;San:80;STR:50;DEX:60;]~
roll[Brawl: cc 50;Shoot: cc 45;SanCheck: .sc {San};]~
notes[Note: test card вҖ” try .char use Sad]~
image[https://example.com/avatar.png]~
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ в–  Edit:
.char edit name[Name]~
state[...]~ roll[...]~ notes[...]~ image[https://example.com/avatar.png]~
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ’» Management в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ в–  Web (recommended):
в”Ӯ 1) Create account: .admin account [user] [password]
в”Ӯ 2) Open https://card.hktrpg.com
в”Ӯ 3) Edit visually and save
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ в–  Chat:
в”Ӯ 1) Use .char edit
в”Ӯ 2) Same format as create
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ“Ҡ Data commands в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ в–  Basics:
в”Ӯ вҖў .char show вҖ” list cards
в”Ӯ вҖў .char show0 вҖ” show card #0 details
в”Ӯ вҖў .char use [name] вҖ” activate
в”Ӯ вҖў .char nonuse вҖ” deactivate
в”Ӯ вҖў .char delete [name] вҖ” delete
в”Ӯ вҖў .ch show вҖ” show status
в”Ӯ вҖў .ch showall вҖ” show full card
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ в–  Avatar (image):
в”Ӯ вҖў In .char add / .char edit: image[https://...]
в”Ӯ вҖў Only http/https; localhost/private IPs rejected
в”Ӯ вҖў Website shows full avatar left of the name
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ в–  Stat ops:
в”Ӯ вҖў .ch [stat] вҖ” show value
в”Ӯ вҖў .ch [stat] [number] вҖ” set value
в”Ӯ вҖў .ch [stat] +/- [number] вҖ” add/subtract
в”Ӯ вҖў .ch [stat] */ [number] вҖ” multiply/divide
в”Ӯ вҖў .ch [stat] +/- [xDy] вҖ” adjust by roll
в”Ӯ вҖў .ch set [stat] new text вҖ” replace text
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹҺІ Special features в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ в–  Discord buttons:
в”Ӯ вҖў .ch button вҖ” status buttons
в”Ӯ вҖў .char button [name] вҖ” roll buttons
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ в–  Button forwarding:
в”Ӯ вҖў .forward [Discord message link]
в”Ӯ вҖў .forward show / .forward delete [id]
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ в–  Expressions:
в”Ӯ вҖў {var}: reference a stat вҖ” e.g. {HP} {san}
в”Ӯ   Math: 1+{HP} вҶ’ 1+15
в”Ӯ вҖў <>: roll expressions
в”Ӯ   <1D100>  <cc {Shoot}>  <.sc {san} 1/1d3>
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ в–  Examples:
в”Ӯ вҖў .ch hp +3 вҖ” heal 3 HP
в”Ӯ вҖў .ch san -<1d6> вҖ” lose 1d6 Sanity
в”Ӯ вҖў .ch str <3D6dl2> вҖ” roll 3d6 drop low 2
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹҢҗ Group settings в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ в–  Admin enable:
в”Ӯ вҖў .admin allowrolling
в”Ӯ вҖў .admin registerChannel
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ в–  Admin disable:
в”Ӯ вҖў .admin disallowrolling
в”Ӯ вҖў .admin unregisterChannel
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ вҡ пёҸ Notes в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ вҖў Do not use spaces in stat names
в”Ӯ вҖў Prefer .ch for daily updates
в”Ӯ вҖў Prefer web UI for large edits
в”Ӯ вҖў Pin buttons for reuse
в”Ӯ вҖў Activate the card per group when switching channels
в•°в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

bcdice.help:
гҖҗрҹҺІ BcDice Japanese TRPGгҖ‘
в•ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹҺҜ Overview в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ вҖў 100+ Japanese TRPG systems
в”Ӯ вҖў Native BcDice commands per system
в”Ӯ вҖў Switch systems per channel
в”Ӯ

в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹҺҜ Rules в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ вҖў 8вҖ“10 = success

в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ“Ҡ Parameters в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў Number of d10s
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў Range 1вҖ“100
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ [reroll]:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў Minimum value that explodes
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў Default 10
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў Range 8вҖ“10
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ [bonus]:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў Flat success modifier
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў Can be positive or negative
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ“қ Examples в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

в”Ӯ гҖҖ- Success on 8+
в”Ӯ гҖҖ- Explode on 10
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ вҖў .15wd9+2
в”Ӯ гҖҖ- Roll 15d10
в”Ӯ гҖҖ- Success on 9+
в”Ӯ гҖҖ- Explode on 10
в”Ӯ гҖҖ- +2 successes

wn.help:
гҖҗрҹҢҷ Witch NightгҖ‘
в•ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹҺІ Standard roll в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ Format:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .wn [x]D[n]Вұ[y]
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Parameters:
в”Ӯ гҖҖx: dice pool size
в”Ӯ гҖҖn: sin threshold (success value)
в”Ӯ гҖҖy: modifier
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Resolution:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў Roll xD6; вүҘ4 is success
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў Default success when sin > 3
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ вҡ”пёҸ Net successes в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ Successes minus failures:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .wn [x]DD[n]Вұ[y]
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў DD mode: successes вҲ’ failures
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў Result may be negative
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ вңЁ House rule (@) в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ Format:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .wn [x]@D[n]Вұ[y]
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Resolution:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў вүӨ sin threshold counts as failure
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў Can combine with DD for net successes
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ“қ Examples в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ Standard:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .wn 3
в”Ӯ гҖҖ  Roll 3d6; success on вүҘ4
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .wn 5D4+3
в”Ӯ гҖҖ  Roll 5d6; success on вүҘ5; then +3
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Net successes:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .wn 3DD6+2
в”Ӯ гҖҖ  Net successes, then +2
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ House rule:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .wn 3@3+3
в”Ӯ гҖҖ  вүӨ3 fails; then +3
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .wn 3@D3+2
в”Ӯ гҖҖ  Net after @ rule, then +2
в•°в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
wn.sin_cost_6: Sin over 6: spend 6 sin, convert to 1 cost.

trpgdb.help:

в•ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ’Ў Overview в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ Store and recall custom text, numbers, or emoji
в”Ӯ Group database (.db) and public database (.dbp)
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ“қ Group commands в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

в”Ӯ   Add an entry

в”Ӯ   List entries
в”Ӯ вҖў .db del title
в”Ӯ   Delete by title
в”Ӯ вҖў .db keyword/index
в”Ӯ   Show entry content
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹҢҗ Public commands в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ вҖў .dbp add/show
в”Ӯ   Add / list public entries
в”Ӯ вҖў .dbp keyword/index
в”Ӯ   Show public entry
в”Ӯ вҖў .dbp newType
в”Ӯ   See special-effect examples
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ вңЁ Placeholders в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ в–  Basics:
в”Ӯ вҖў {br} вҖ” newline
в”Ӯ вҖў {ran:100} вҖ” random 1вҖ“100
в”Ӯ вҖў {random:5-20} вҖ” random 5вҖ“20
в”Ӯ вҖў {server.member_count} вҖ” member count
в”Ӯ вҖў {my.name} вҖ” user name
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ в–  With .level enabled:
в”Ӯ вҖў {my.level} вҖ” level
в”Ӯ вҖў {my.exp} вҖ” EXP
в”Ӯ вҖў {my.title} вҖ” title
в”Ӯ вҖў {my.Ranking} вҖ” rank

в•ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ“қ Overview в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ вҖў Block bot replies matching keywords
в”Ӯ вҖў Fuzzy match on commands

в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ вҡҷпёҸ Commands в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ вҖў .bk add keyword вҖ” add filter
в”Ӯ вҖў .bk show вҖ” list filters
в”Ӯ вҖў .bk del index вҖ” remove by index
в”Ӯ вҖў .bk del all вҖ” clear all
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ вҡ пёҸ Notes в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

в”Ӯ вҖў e.g. "D" blocks any command containing D
в”Ӯ вҖў Use show to refresh if not applied

role.help:
гҖҗрҹ‘Ҙ Role ReactionsгҖ‘(Discord only)
в•ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ“қ Overview в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ вҖў Assign roles when users click emoji reactions
в”Ӯ вҖў Requires admin permissions & related grants
в”Ӯ вҖў Enable Developer Mode to copy IDs
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ вҡҷпёҸ Setup в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ 1. Enable Developer Mode:
в”Ӯ    User Settings > Advanced > Developer Mode
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ 2. Copy role ID:
в”Ӯ    Server Settings > Roles > right-click role > Copy ID
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ 3. Copy message ID:
в”Ӯ    Right-click the message > Copy ID
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ’« Commands в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ в–  Add reaction mapping:
.roleReact add
ROLE_ID emoji
[[messageID]]
MESSAGE_ID
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Example:
.roleReact add
232312882291231263 рҹҺЁ
123123478897792323 рҹҳҒ
[[messageID]]
12312347889779233
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹҺҜ Effect в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ вҖў Message 12312347889779233 shows рҹҺЁ and рҹҳҒ
в”Ӯ вҖў React рҹҺЁ вҶ’ get the Painter role
в”Ӯ вҖў React рҹҳҒ вҶ’ get the Smile role
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ в–  Manage:
в”Ӯ вҖў .roleReact show вҖ” list configs
в”Ӯ вҖў .roleReact delete serial вҖ” remove entry
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ вҡ пёҸ Notes в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ вҖў Needs Manage Roles permission
в”Ӯ вҖў Needs Add Reactions permission
в”Ӯ вҖў Same message ID can map multiple emoji
в•°в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

schedule.help:
гҖҗвҸ° Scheduled MessagesгҖ‘
в•ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ“… One-shot (.at) в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ вҖў Exact time: .at 20220604 1900
в”Ӯ вҖў Countdown: .at 5mins / 5hours
в”Ӯ вҖў Message + dice: .at 9mins roll in 5 min [[CC 60]]
в”Ӯ
в•ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ вҢӣ Recurring (.cron) в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ вҖў Daily: .cron 1230
в”Ӯ вҖў Every N days: .cron 1921-2
в”Ӯ вҖў Weekdays: .cron 1921-wed-mon
в”Ӯ вҖў Combo: .cron 1921-2-wed-sun
в”Ӯ вҖў With message: .cron 1921 daily at 19:21
в”Ӯ вҖў With dice: .cron 1921 [[CC 80 Luck]]
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹҺІ Format в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ вҖў Time: YYYYMMDD HHMM (24h)
в”Ӯ вҖў Countdown units: mins, hours
в”Ӯ вҖў Weekdays: Sun Mon Tue Wed Thu Fri Sat
в”Ӯ вҖў Dice: wrap commands in [[ ]]
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ вҡҷпёҸ Manage в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ вҖў List: .at show / .cron show
в”Ӯ вҖў Delete: .at delete N / .cron delete N
в”Ӯ вҖў Note: .at and .cron use separate fixed serials
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ‘‘ Patreon в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ Custom sender:
в”Ӯ .cron 2258
в”Ӯ name=SenderName
в”Ӯ link=https://example.com/avatar.png
в”Ӯ message body
в”Ӯ [[dice command]]
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ“қ Example в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
.cron 2258
name=Sad
link=https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/23254376/113255717-bd47a300-92fa-11eb-90f2-7ebd00cd372f.png
wwwww
[[2d3]]
hello world

в”Ӯ .edit line one

в”Ӯ line three

в”Ӯ рҹ”‘ Permissions:

kc.help:
гҖҗрҹҳә Cat Ghost MessengerгҖ‘
в•ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹҺІ Format в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ вҖў .kc [x]D[y] [z]
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹҺҜ Parameters в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ [x] вҖ” dice count:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў Default: 4
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў Allowed: 4 or 5
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў Omit to use default
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ [y] вҖ” modifier:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў Range: 1вҖ“20
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ [z] вҖ” target:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў Range: 1вҖ“20
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ“Ӣ Resolution в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ Success requires:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў At least one pair
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў Achievement = sum of remaining dice
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Special rules:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў With two pairs, use the higher pair
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў Achievement of 3 = dramatic failure
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹҺ® Play style в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ вҖў Roll 4вҖ“5 six-sided dice
в”Ӯ вҖў Find pairs
в”Ӯ вҖў Sum the remaining dice
в”Ӯ вҖў Compare against the target
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ“қ Examples в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ вҖў .kc 4D10 15
в”Ӯ вҖў .kc D8 12
в”Ӯ вҖў .kc 5D12 18
в•°в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

гҖҗрҹ”Қ Wiki & TranslationгҖ‘
в•ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ“ҡ Wikipedia в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

в”Ӯ Features:

в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Special:

в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹҢҗ Translate в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў Japanese вҖ” ja

в”Ӯ

в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ“қ Examples в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

event.help:
гҖҗрҹҺІ EventsгҖ‘.event (add delete show) .evt (random / event name)
Added events can grant status or change EXP, and earn bonus EXP.
в•ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ“қ Basic commands в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ .event add              - add an event
в”Ӯ .event delete <name>    - delete an event
в”Ӯ .event show             - list your events & earned EXP
в”Ӯ .event show <name>      - show details for one event
в”Ӯ .event useExp           - spend earned EXP in the group
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹҺҜ Play commands в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ .evt random             - random event (costs 5 EN)
в”Ӯ .evt <series name>      - enter a series (costs 10 EN)
в”Ӯ .evt <event name>       - enter an event (costs 15 EN)
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ вҡЎ Energy в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ EN cap = 20+LV
в”Ӯ вҸ° +1 EN every 10 minutes
в”Ӯ рҹ’Ў Learn names via others or random events
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ“қ Add format в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ .event add
в”Ӯ name:Haha
в”Ӯ chain:Happy Series
в”Ӯ exp:SAN
в”Ӯ 0:Good luck today;You are kind;I love you
в”Ӯ -1:You got hit;Bad luck вҖ” lose SAN
в”Ӯ 1:You ate tasty candy, +SAN
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹҺІ Outcome types в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ Positive:
в”Ӯ  1. Gain X EXP immediately
в”Ӯ  2. Next X gains give XГ— EXP
в”Ӯ  3. Whole group gains 1 EXP
в”Ӯ  4. Author shares earned EXP
в”Ӯ  5. Drain X EXP from X people in the channel
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Negative:
в”Ӯ -1. Lose X EXP immediately
в”Ӯ -2. Stop gaining EXP for X times
в”Ӯ -3. Author drains X EXP from you
в”Ӯ -4. Distribute X EXP to X people in the channel
в”Ӯ -5. Next X messages each lose EXP
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ вҡ–пёҸ Design limits в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ вң… More positive options than negative in one event
в”Ӯ рҹ“Ҡ Up to 3+(ROUNDDOWN designerLV/10) options
в”Ӯ вҡ пёҸ Cannot be all-positive
в”Ӯ рҹ”Ӣ Total EN budget (10+LV); negative outcomes cost EN
в•°в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

storyteller.help:
гҖҗрҹ“– Interactive StoryTellerгҖ‘
в•ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ’Ў Features в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ - Multi-page branches, if/else / ifs, random & ending pages
в”Ӯ - Player vars, story vars, attributes; math & conditions
в”Ӯ - Dice: text {2d6}; conditions/assign: 2d6>=7, 3d6+2, вҖҰ
в”Ӯ - Import / update / verify / export RUN_DESIGN or JSON
в”Ӯ - Participation: author only / everyone / Discord poll (timed)
в”Ӯ - Auto-pause: idle games pause after 1 hour
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹҡҖ Quick start в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ .st start <alias|title> [alone|all|poll x]
в”Ӯ   Start a story. alone=author only; all=anyone; poll=Discord vote x min (default 3)
в”Ӯ .st list
в”Ӯ   List stories you can start here
в”Ӯ .st pause / .st continue [runId]
в”Ӯ   Pause or resume (use runId to resume across devices)
в”Ӯ .st edit alone|all|poll x
в”Ӯ   Change participation; poll is Discord-only (x minutes, default 3)
в”Ӯ .st end
в”Ӯ   End the current run
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹҺҜ Gameplay в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ .st goto <page>
в”Ӯ   Jump to a page/option (UI lists available choices)
в”Ӯ .st set <var> <value>
в”Ӯ   Set a player variable (e.g. .st set name Hana / .st set hp 12)
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ§° Story management в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ .st my [alias]
в”Ӯ   Stats for stories you created (optional single alias)
в”Ӯ .st mylist
в”Ӯ   List all stories you created
в”Ӯ .st list <alias>
в”Ӯ   Show intro & info for that story
в”Ӯ .st import <alias> [title]
в”Ӯ   Upload .json or .txt (RUN_DESIGN) to add a story (Discord only)
в”Ӯ .st update <alias> [title]
в”Ӯ   Overwrite an existing story via attachment (Discord only)
в”Ӯ .st delete <alias>
в”Ӯ   Delete a story you own
в”Ӯ .st export <alias>
в”Ӯ   DM a RUN_DESIGN text file and notify the channel (Discord, permission required)
в”Ӯ .st verify <alias>
в”Ӯ   Round-trip check: JSON вҶ’ RUN_DESIGN вҶ’ JSON
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ”җ Launch permissions в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ .st allow <alias> AUTHOR
в”Ӯ   Only the author can start anywhere (default)
в”Ӯ .st allow <alias>
в”Ӯ   Allow start in the current group/channel
в”Ӯ .st allow <alias> <groupId...>
в”Ӯ   Allow start in listed groups/channels
в”Ӯ .st allow <alias> all
в”Ӯ   Anyone can start (public)
в”Ӯ .st disallow <alias> [groupId...]
в”Ӯ   Revoke allow in current group/channel (or remove listed groupIds)
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ“Һ Examples в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ .st list              | list startable stories
в”Ӯ .st start MistVillage | start that story
в”Ӯ .st set name Hana     | set a player variable
в”Ӯ .st goto 12           | jump to a page
в”Ӯ .st pause / .st continue / .st end
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ в„№пёҸ Notes в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ - poll, import, export, update are Discord-only; default poll time is 3 minutes
в”Ӯ - Authoring guide: https://bothelp.hktrpg.com/
в•°в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

гҖҗрҹҺ® PokeRoleгҖ‘

в”Ӯ вҖў .poke вҖ” show full command list

в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ”Қ PokГ©mon lookup в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ Basic:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .poke mon [name/number]
в”Ӯ гҖҖ  e.g. .poke mon Mewtwo
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Move list:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .poke mon [name/number] --d
в”Ӯ гҖҖ  e.g. .poke mon Mewtwo --d
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ вҡ”пёҸ Move lookup в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ вҖў .poke move [move name]
в”Ӯ гҖҖe.g. .poke move Flame Wheel

в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹҸҶ Battle simulation в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ Format:

в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Attacker:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў Move name
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў Type (e.g. Fire, Water)
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Defender:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў PokГ©mon name/number
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў Single or dual type
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Examples:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .poke vs Fire Pledge Mew
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .poke vs Fire 100
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .poke vs Fire Psychic,Water
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ“ҡ Source в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ вҖў hazmole.github.io/PokeRole
в”Ӯ вҖў Free open-source TRPG localization team

digmon.help:
гҖҗрҹҺ® Digimon Story: Time StrangerгҖ‘(beta)
в•ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ“– Basics в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ вҖў .digi вҖ” show full command list
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ”Қ Digimon lookup в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ вҖў .digi [name/number]
в”Ӯ   e.g. .digi Agumon
в”Ӯ   e.g. .digi 123
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ”„ Evolution path в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ вҖў .digi [from] [to]
в”Ӯ   e.g. .digi 123 323
в”Ӯ   e.g. .digi Agumon WarGreymon
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ вҡ”пёҸ Move search в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ вҖў .digi -m [keyword]
в”Ӯ   e.g. .digi -m fire
в”Ӯ   e.g. .digi -m all enemies
в”Ӯ   e.g. .digi -m Virus
в”Ӯ вҖў Fuzzy search; results sorted by power (max 10)
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ“Ӣ List filters в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ вҖў .digi list [options]
в”Ӯ   e.g. .digi list --attr=Vaccine --stage=Ultimate
в”Ӯ   e.g. .digi list --move-element=Fire --has-jogress
в”Ӯ   e.g. .digi list --attr=Data --can-ride
в”Ӯ Filters:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў --attr=[Vaccine|Data|Virus]
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў --stage=[Baby I|Baby II|Rookie|Champion|Ultimate|Mega|Ultra]
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў --move-element=[Fire|Water|Ice|Electric|Light|Dark|None|-]
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў --move-target=[all enemies|single enemy|all allies|single ally|self]
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў --move-type=[Physical|Magic|Buff|HP%|Debuff|Recovery]
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў --has-jogress/--no-jogress
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў --has-item/--no-item
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў --can-ride/--no-ride
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ“Ҡ Single-result fields в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ вҖў Base personality
в”Ӯ вҖў Possible base lineages
в”Ӯ вҖў Attribute resistances
в”Ӯ вҖў Skills that counter this Digimon
в”Ӯ вҖў Locations
в”Ӯ вҖў Full evolution / devolution paths
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹҺҜ Stages в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ 1: Baby I     2: Baby II
в”Ӯ 3: Rookie     4: Champion
в”Ӯ 5: Ultimate   6: Mega
в”Ӯ 7: Ultra      a: Armor
в”Ӯ d: Hybrid
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ“ҡ Source в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ вҖў Digimon Story: Time Stranger

admin.help:
гҖҗвҡҷпёҸ Admin ToolboxгҖ‘
в•ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ”Қ System Monitoring в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ Status check:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .admin state
в”Ӯ гҖҖ  - Check Rollbot runtime status
в”Ӯ гҖҖ  - Show system resource usage
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ ID lookup:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .admin id or .patreon id
в”Ӯ гҖҖ  - Show your user ID
в”Ӯ гҖҖ  - Show current group ID
в”Ӯ гҖҖ  - Works on all platforms
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Patreon / VIP level:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .patreon level
в”Ӯ гҖҖ  - Check your and current group's VIP (Patreon) level
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Debug:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .admin debug
в”Ӯ гҖҖ  - Show detailed group data
в”Ӯ гҖҖ  - Show setting status
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Database status:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .admin mongod
в”Ӯ гҖҖ  - Check MongoDB connection status
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ System protection status:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .admin clusterhealth
в”Ӯ гҖҖ  - Check DB and cluster protection layers
в”Ӯ гҖҖ  - Show degraded mode and health stats
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ‘Ө Account Management в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ Web character card account:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .admin account [username] [password]
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Username rules:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў Length: 4-16 chars
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў Allowed: Chinese, English
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Password rules:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў Length: 6-16 chars
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў Allowed: letters
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў Symbols: !@#$%^&*
в”Ӯ 
в”Ӯ Must be configured in direct chat with HKTRPG,
в”Ӯ do not use in group channels
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Channel registration:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .admin registerChannel
в”Ӯ гҖҖ  - Register current channel
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .admin unregisterChannel
в”Ӯ гҖҖ  - Unregister current channel
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Rolling permission:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .admin allowrolling
в”Ӯ гҖҖ  - Allow web rolling in this channel
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .admin disallowrolling
в”Ӯ гҖҖ  - Remove web rolling permission
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ“ў Update Notifications в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ Enable:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .admin news on
в”Ӯ гҖҖ  Receive HKTRPG updates
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Disable:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .admin news off
в”Ӯ гҖҖ  Stop receiving updates
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹ”җ System Admin Only в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
в”Ӯ Service restart:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .root respawn [ID]
в”Ӯ гҖҖ  - Restart the service by ID
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .root respawnall
в”Ӯ гҖҖ  - Restart all services
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ VIP management:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .root addVipGroup -i ID -l LV -n NAME -no NOTES -s SWITCH
в”Ӯ гҖҖ  - Add VIP group
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .root addVipUser -i ID -l LV -n NAME -no NOTES -s SWITCH
в”Ӯ гҖҖ  - Add VIP user
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Patreon members:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .root addpatreon PATREON_NAME tier=A|B|C|D|E|F [-no NOTES] [-s on|off]
в”Ӯ гҖҖ  - Generate KEY on create; update only tier/notes/status, keep KEY
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .root regenkeypatreon PATREON_NAME
в”Ӯ гҖҖ  - Regenerate KEY, old KEY expires immediately
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .root onpatreon PATREON_NAME
в”Ӯ гҖҖ  - Enable this member
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .root offpatreon PATREON_NAME
в”Ӯ гҖҖ  - Disable this member (and revoke assigned VIP)
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .root importpatreon [allkeys|newonly] [-email]
в”Ӯ гҖҖ  - Upload .csv to sync members. allkeys=all keys, newonly=new keys only. -email=generate email content file
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Command registration:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .root registeredGlobal
в”Ӯ гҖҖ  - Register global commands
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .root testRegistered [ID]
в”Ӯ гҖҖ  - Test command registration status
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .root removeSlashCommands [ID]
в”Ӯ гҖҖ  - Remove Slash commands from target group (uses current group if ID missing)
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Encryption:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .root decrypt [encrypted_text]
в”Ӯ гҖҖ  - Decrypt text
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Shard fix:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .root fixshard check
в”Ӯ гҖҖ  - Check all shard status
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .root fixshard start
в”Ӯ гҖҖ  - Start auto-fixing unresponsive shards
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .root fixshard stop
в”Ӯ гҖҖ  - Stop auto-fix
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .root fixshard status
в”Ӯ гҖҖ  - Show fix status

в”Ӯ Send notifications:
в”Ӯ гҖҖвҖў .root send News [message]
в”Ӯ гҖҖ  - Send update notification
в•°в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

views.roll_readme_html:
Features
  • Many dice commands: 1d100, 2d6, 1d20, etc.
  • Custom room names
  • Light / dark theme
  • Quick command panel
  • Download chat logs
  • Multiple rooms
  • Live online count
  • Custom nickname
How to use
  1. Enter a nickname (default: Investigator + random number; use Regenerate to change)
  2. Click Join room or enter a room name
  3. Type a roll command or chat message
  4. Click Send or press Enter
Dice format
  • Basic: XdY (X dice, Y sides)
  • Examples:
    • 1d100 вҖ” one d100
    • 2d6 вҖ” two d6
    • 1d20 вҖ” one d20
Quick commands
  • Open the quick command panel from the keyboard button
  • Preset: 1d2, 1d6, 1d8, 1d10, 1d12, 1d20, 1d100
  • Up to 5 custom shortcuts
  • Tap a button to send
More
  • Quick input toggles the command panel
  • Download saves chat log (HKTRPG + room name)
  • Help opens this guide
  • Dark mode toggles theme
  • Regenerate picks a new nickname
Personal room
  • Stored locally only; not uploaded to the server
  • Bot replies appear locally only
  • Delete clears content (room stays); confirmation required
  • Cannot be undone
Notes
  • 100 messages per room max
  • Room names must be unique
  • Default room Public cannot be deleted
  • Nickname max 50 characters
  • Message max 1000 characters

More tutorials:

HKTRPG Help

views.readme_body_html:
Getting started
  1. In Discord / Telegram / Line, send to HKTRPG:
    .admin account (username) (password)
    to create a management account.
  2. Open the Character Card Manager and log in with that account.
  3. After login you can manage and edit your character cards on the web.
Adding a character card

Send this command to HKTRPG (customize name and fields):

.char add name[Character Name]~
state[HP:15/15;MP:10/10;San:80]~
roll[Brawl:cc 50;sc:cc {san}]~
notes[Notes:sample]~

After вҖңadded successfullyвҖқ, refresh this page to see the new card. You can also edit existing cards here.

Basic steps
  1. Click вҖңSelect character cardвҖқ to pick a character
  2. Click the dice icon to roll
  3. Click вҖңDetailed helpвҖқ for full usage and formula examples
Full guide

See the official character card tutorial (includes chat commands).
views.detailed_help_body_html:
This guide covers web UI only. For Discord / chat commands see the link at the bottom.

1. Basic usage
  • Login & select card: After login, click вҖңSelect character cardвҖқ. Saved data syncs with Discord / chat apps.
  • Info tags under name: Small tags (e.g. DB, occupation, traits) appear under the name. Sources: (1) вҖңCharacter detailsвҖқ label/value pairs; (2) non-numeric current-only stat fields (occupation, traits, DB+1D4, etc.). Up to 6 tags, display only вҖ” rolls are unaffected.
  • Stats: Use Вұ to adjust current values. вҖңEdit modeвҖқ lets you rename fields, edit current/max, or add/remove rows.
  • Rolling: Click the dice icon beside a roll field. Enter a dice command; you may use {variable} (see below). No angle brackets needed.
  • Notes: Plain text. Long notes show a button to open the full text in a popup.
  • Avatar: In edit mode, enter an image URL (http/https only; no LAN or localhost).
2. Advanced (web settings & syntax)
  • Roll channel (private cards): Pick a Discord channel to forward roll results. The server must be registered for rolling by an admin.
  • Public / private: Set a card to вҖңPublicвҖқ to list it on public cards for others to view and roll. Set back to вҖңPrivateвҖқ to hide.
  • Variable references: In roll formulas use {field name} to pull the current value from Stats (case-insensitive). The bot substitutes the value before rolling.
  • Roll syntax (web): Enter the dice command directly in each roll field.
  • Skill then damage: e.g. baton вҖ” one field вҖңBrawlвҖқ with CC 49 or CC {Brawl}, another вҖңDamageвҖқ with 1d6{db} (DB value already includes +, so not 1d6+{db}). Roll skill first, then damage.
  • Roll result toasts: Results appear top-right. (1) Hover pauses auto-dismiss and pins position. (2) Click рҹ“Ң to keep until refresh or unpin.
  • Formula examples (sample stats, DB = +1d4):
    HPLuckDBBrawl
    1160+1d449
    FieldSubstitutionRoll
    1d{HP}{HP} вҶ’ 11Becomes 1d11
    1d100+{hp}{hp} вҶ’ 11 (same as HP)Becomes 1d100+11
    CC {Luck}{Luck} вҶ’ 60Becomes cc 60 (CoC skill check)
    CC 49 or CC {Brawl}49 or {Brawl}вҶ’49Skill check (e.g. brawl first)
    1d6{db} (damage){db} вҶ’ +1d4Becomes 1d6+1d4
